jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Barista
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!
